name: career-engine
description: Markdown-first career fieldwork skills for understanding real work, teams, and institutions.

metadata.description: Understand real work through field observation, interviews, and slow career decision loops.

plugins.name: career-engine
plugins.description: Main framing skill for studying real work through field observation and markdown-first synthesis.

plugins.name: workplace-sensing
plugins.description: Read a team, manager, or company as a real work environment.

plugins.name: informational-interview
plugins.description: Design a high-signal conversation that tests specific hypotheses about a target.

plugins.name: post-interview-analysis
plugins.description: Turn interview experience into updated signals, risks, and decisions.

plugins.name: public-surface-positioning
plugins.description: Turn real work evidence into a clearer LinkedIn, GitHub, and optional X surface.
